name: sap agents list
body_template: {"query":"SELECT SlpCode, SlpName, Active, Memo FROM dbo.OSLP ORDER BY SlpName OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap customers list
body_template: {"query":"SELECT c.CardCode, c.CardName, c.CardType, c.GroupCode, c.Phone1, c.Cellular, c.E_Mail, c.Address, c.City, c.Country, c.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, c.VatStatus AS IsTaxable, c.frozenFor AS IsFrozen, c.validFor AS IsActive, c.Discount AS DiscountPercent, c.CreditLine AS CreditLimit, c.LicTradNum AS FederalTaxID FROM dbo.OCRD c LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = c.SlpCode WHERE c.CardType = 'C' ORDER BY c.CardCode OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap categories (item groups) list
body_template: {"query":"SELECT g.ItmsGrpCod AS CategoryCode, g.ItmsGrpNam AS CategoryName, g.Locked FROM dbo.OITB g ORDER BY g.ItmsGrpCod OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap products list (extended + 40 properties)
body_template: {"query":"SELECT i.ItemCode, i.ItemName, i.ItmsGrpCod AS ItemGroupCode, g.ItmsGrpNam AS ItemGroup, i.FirmCode, m.FirmName AS ManufacturerName, i.CodeBars AS BarCode, i.SellItem, i.InvntItem, i.PrchseItem, i.validFor AS IsActive, i.frozenFor AS IsFrozen, i.OnHand, i.IsCommited, i.OnOrder, (i.OnHand + i.OnOrder - i.IsCommited) AS AvailableTotal, i.AvgPrice, i.LastPurPrc, i.LastPurCur, i.SWeight1, i.ManSerNum, i.ManBtchNum, i.QryGroup1 AS Property01, i.QryGroup2 AS Property02, i.QryGroup3 AS Property03, i.QryGroup4 AS Property04, i.QryGroup5 AS Property05, i.QryGroup6 AS Property06, i.QryGroup7 AS Property07, i.QryGroup8 AS Property08, i.QryGroup9 AS Property09, i.QryGroup10 AS Property10, i.QryGroup11 AS Property11, i.QryGroup12 AS Property12, i.QryGroup13 AS Property13, i.QryGroup14 AS Property14, i.QryGroup15 AS Property15, i.QryGroup16 AS Property16, i.QryGroup17 AS Property17, i.QryGroup18 AS Property18, i.QryGroup19 AS Property19, i.QryGroup20 AS Property20, i.QryGroup21 AS Property21, i.QryGroup22 AS Property22, i.QryGroup23 AS Property23, i.QryGroup24 AS Property24, i.QryGroup25 AS Property25, i.QryGroup26 AS Property26, i.QryGroup27 AS Property27, i.QryGroup28 AS Property28, i.QryGroup29 AS Property29, i.QryGroup30 AS Property30, i.QryGroup31 AS Property31, i.QryGroup32 AS Property32, i.QryGroup33 AS Property33, i.QryGroup34 AS Property34, i.QryGroup35 AS Property35, i.QryGroup36 AS Property36, i.QryGroup37 AS Property37, i.QryGroup38 AS Property38, i.QryGroup39 AS Property39, i.QryGroup40 AS Property40 FROM dbo.OITM i LEFT JOIN dbo.OITB g ON g.ItmsGrpCod = i.ItmsGrpCod LEFT JOIN dbo.OMRC m ON m.FirmCode = i.FirmCode ORDER BY i.ItemCode OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap warehouses list
body_template: {"query":"SELECT WhsCode, WhsName, Street, City, Country, Locked FROM dbo.OWHS ORDER BY WhsCode OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap price lists
body_template: {"query":"SELECT ListNum, ListName, BASE_NUM, Factor, RoundSys, GroupCode, IsGrossPrc FROM dbo.OPLN ORDER BY ListNum OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap customers price lists
body_template: {"query":"SELECT c.CardCode, c.CardName, c.ListNum AS PriceListNum, p.ListName AS PriceListName FROM dbo.OCRD c LEFT JOIN dbo.OPLN p ON p.ListNum = c.ListNum WHERE c.CardType = 'C' ORDER BY c.CardCode OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap alternate catalog codes only
body_template: {"query":"SELECT CardCode, ItemCode, Substitute AS AlternateCatNum FROM dbo.OSCN ORDER BY CardCode, ItemCode OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap orders by customer
body_template: {"query":"SELECT o.DocEntry, o.DocNum, o.DocDate, o.DocDueDate, o.CardCode, o.CardName, o.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, o.DocCur, o.DocRate, o.DocTotal, o.VatSum AS VatSum, o.VatSum AS TaxSum, o.DiscSum, o.PaidToDate, o.DocStatus, o.CANCELED FROM dbo.ORDR o LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = o.SlpCode WHERE o.CardCode = @CardCode AND o.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND o.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY o.DocDate DESC, o.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}","CardCode":"{{userExtId}}"}}

name: sap orders for agents
body_template: {"query":"SELECT o.DocEntry, o.DocNum, o.DocDate, o.DocDueDate, o.CardCode, o.CardName, o.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, o.DocCur, o.DocRate, o.DocTotal, o.VatSum AS VatSum, o.VatSum AS TaxSum, o.DiscSum, o.PaidToDate, o.DocStatus, o.CANCELED FROM dbo.ORDR o LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = o.SlpCode WHERE o.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND o.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY o.DocDate DESC, o.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

name: sap quotations by customer
body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.OQUT d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.CardCode = @CardCode AND d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}","CardCode":"{{userExtId}}"}}

name: sap quotations for agents
body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.OQUT d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.ODLN d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.CardCode = @CardCode AND d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}","CardCode":"{{userExtId}}"}}

body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.ODLN d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

name: sap returns by customer
body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.ORDN d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.CardCode = @CardCode AND d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}","CardCode":"{{userExtId}}"}}

body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.ORDN d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.OINV d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.CardCode = @CardCode AND d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}","CardCode":"{{userExtId}}"}}

body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.OINV d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

name: sap A/R credit memos by customer
body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.ORIN d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.CardCode = @CardCode AND d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}","CardCode":"{{userExtId}}"}}

body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.ORIN d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.ODPI d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.CardCode = @CardCode AND d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}","CardCode":"{{userExtId}}"}}

name: sap A/R down payments for agents
body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.ODPI d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

name: sap correction invoices by customer
body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.OCSI d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.CardCode = @CardCode AND d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}","CardCode":"{{userExtId}}"}}

name: sap correction invoices for agents
body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum AS VatSum, d.VatSum AS TaxSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.OCSI d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

name: sap quotation (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.VatSum AS VatSum, T0.VatSum AS TaxSum, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.QUT1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.OQUT T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap order (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.VatSum AS VatSum, T0.VatSum AS TaxSum, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.RDR1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.ORDR T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap delivery (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.VatSum AS VatSum, T0.VatSum AS TaxSum, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.DLN1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.ODLN T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap return (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.VatSum AS VatSum, T0.VatSum AS TaxSum, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.RDN1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.ORDN T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap A/R invoice (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.VatSum AS VatSum, T0.VatSum AS TaxSum, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.INV1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.OINV T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap A/R credit memo (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.VatSum AS VatSum, T0.VatSum AS TaxSum, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.RIN1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.ORIN T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap A/R down payment (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.VatSum AS VatSum, T0.VatSum AS TaxSum, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.DPI1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.ODPI T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap correction invoice (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.VatSum AS VatSum, T0.VatSum AS TaxSum, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.CSI1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.OCSI T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap customer purchase history by SKU
body_template: {"query":"SELECT t0.DocEntry, t0.DocNum, t0.DocDate, t0.CardCode, t0.CardName, t1.ItemCode, t1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, t1.Quantity, t1.Price, t1.LineTotal, t1.WhsCode, t0.DocCur FROM dbo.ORDR t0 INNER JOIN dbo.RDR1 t1 ON t0.DocEntry = t1.DocEntry WHERE t0.CardCode = @CardCode AND t1.ItemCode = @ItemCode ORDER BY t0.DocDate DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"CardCode":"{{userExtId}}","ItemCode":"{{ItemCode}}","offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap customer debits
body_template: {"query":"SELECT t1.TransId, t0.RefDate, t0.BaseRef AS DocNum, t1.ShortName AS CardCode, t1.Line_ID, t1.Debit, t1.Ref1, t1.LineMemo FROM dbo.OJDT t0 INNER JOIN dbo.JDT1 t1 ON t0.BatchNum = t1.BatchNum WHERE t1.ShortName = @CardCode AND t1.Debit > 0 AND t0.RefDate >= @dateFrom AND t0.RefDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY t0.RefDate DESC","params":{"CardCode":"{{userExtId}}","dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

name: sap customer journal
body_template: {"query":"SELECT t1.TransId, t0.RefDate, t0.BaseRef AS DocNum, t1.ShortName AS CardCode, t1.LineMemo, t1.Debit, t1.Credit, (t1.Debit - t1.Credit) AS NetAmount, t0.TransType FROM dbo.OJDT t0 INNER JOIN dbo.JDT1 t1 ON t0.BatchNum = t1.BatchNum WHERE t1.ShortName = @CardCode AND t0.RefDate >= @dateFrom AND t0.RefDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY t0.RefDate DESC, t1.TransId DESC","params":{"CardCode":"{{userExtId}}","dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

name: sap warehouse stock detailed by SKU
body_template: {"query":"SELECT t0.ItemCode, t1.ItemName, t0.WhsCode, t2.WhsName, t0.OnHand, t0.IsCommited, t0.OnOrder, (t0.OnHand + t0.OnOrder - t0.IsCommited) AS Available FROM dbo.OITW t0 INNER JOIN dbo.OITM t1 ON t0.ItemCode = t1.ItemCode INNER JOIN dbo.OWHS t2 ON t0.WhsCode = t2.WhsCode WHERE t0.ItemCode = @ItemCode AND (t0.OnHand <> 0 OR t0.OnOrder <> 0 OR t0.IsCommited <> 0) ORDER BY t0.WhsCode","params":{"ItemCode":"{{ItemCode}}"}}

name: sap warehouse stock detailed by SKU
body_template: {"query":"SELECT t0.ItemCode, t1.ItemName, t0.WhsCode, t2.WhsName, t0.OnHand, t0.IsCommited, t0.OnOrder, (t0.OnHand + t0.OnOrder - t0.IsCommited) AS Available FROM dbo.OITW t0 INNER JOIN dbo.OITM t1 ON t0.ItemCode = t1.ItemCode INNER JOIN dbo.OWHS t2 ON t0.WhsCode = t2.WhsCode WHERE t0.ItemCode = @ItemCode AND (t0.OnHand <> 0 OR t0.OnOrder <> 0 OR t0.IsCommited <> 0) ORDER BY t0.WhsCode","params":{"ItemCode":"{{ItemCode}}"}}

name: sap customer 360 profile summary
body_template: {"query":"SELECT t0.CardCode, t0.CardName, t0.Balance, t0.OrdersBal, t0.DnotesBal, t0.CreditLine, t2.SlpName AS SalesAgent, t0.Phone1, t0.E_Mail, t0.CntctPrsn FROM dbo.OCRD t0 LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP t2 ON t0.SlpCode = t2.SlpCode WHERE t0.CardCode = @CardCode","params":{"CardCode":"{{userExtId}}"}}

name: sap unique itemcodes bought by customer
body_template: {"query":"SELECT DISTINCT T.ItemCode FROM (SELECT t1.ItemCode FROM dbo.OINV t0 INNER JOIN dbo.INV1 t1 ON t0.DocEntry = t1.DocEntry WHERE t0.CardCode = @CardCode UNION SELECT t1.ItemCode FROM dbo.ODLN t0 INNER JOIN dbo.DLN1 t1 ON t0.DocEntry = t1.DocEntry WHERE t0.CardCode = @CardCode UNION SELECT t1.ItemCode FROM dbo.ORDR t0 INNER JOIN dbo.RDR1 t1 ON t0.DocEntry = t1.DocEntry WHERE t0.CardCode = @CardCode) T ORDER BY T.ItemCode","params":{"CardCode":"{{userExtId}}"}}
